Name: Swazipharm
Description:
Since 1985, Swazipharm Wholesale (Pty) Ltd has been Eswatini's most trusted supplier of essential healthcare products. With over 35 years of experience, a highly skilled team, and state-of-the-art infrastructure, we ensure that patients across the country receive the care they deserve—on time, every time. Our mission is to bridge the gap between global manufacturers and Eswatini’s health institutions, providing reliable access to essential medical supplies while upholding strict regulatory standards.

Our comprehensive product offering is curated to meet the evolving needs of modern healthcare. It includes:

1. Pharmaceuticals: A wide range of human pharmaceuticals, from antibiotics and chronic medication to pediatric and specialized treatments. We ensure quality, availability, and affordability.

2. Surgical & Clinical Consumables: High-quality diagnostic consumables that enable accurate testing and reliable results for laboratories and healthcare facilities.

3. Rehabilitation & Mobility Aids: Solutions like crutches, walking frames, wheelchairs, and support braces that enhance patient independence and recovery.

4. Veterinary Health: High-quality antibiotics, vaccines, dewormers, and nutritional supplements to support the health and productivity of livestock and animals.

5. Diagnostic & Laboratory Solutions: A range that includes diagnostic consumables like test kits and reagents, as well as essential lab equipment.

As a fully registered and compliant entity, Swazipharm has built a reputation for excellence, integrity, and consistent service. We pride ourselves on partnering with global manufacturers and aligning with regulatory standards, ensuring every product we supply supports safe and effective care. We are proud to be Eswatini's trusted partner in healthcare.

To learn more, contact us at info@swazipharm.co.sz or (+268) 2518 5484/5454

Name: SABANA Medizinbedarf GmbH
Description:
Gegründet im Jahr 2007 hat sich SABANA in den letzten 17 Jahren zu einem der anerkannten und etablierten Partner für chirurgisch tätige Ärzte aller Fachgruppen in Deutschland und Europa entwickelt. Wir versorgen unsere Kunden europaweit mit atraumatischen chirurgischen Nahtmaterial.

Das ausgewählte Sortiment an resorbierbarem und nicht resorbierbarem Nahtmaterial wurde gemeinsam und in enger Zusammenarbeit mit praktisch tätigen und international anerkannten Chirurgen entwickelt.

Wir sind jeden Tag für Sie da. Kompetent, freundlich und immer persönlich.

SABANA konzentriert sich kompromisslos auf die Herstellung und den Vertrieb von chirurgischem Nahtmaterial in höchster Qualität zu einem erstklassigen Preis-Leistungsverhältnis. Dabei beschränken wir uns bewusst auf ein überschaubares Sortiment von qualitativ hochwertigen Produkten.

SABANA nutzt modernste Fertigungstechnologien, zeitgemäße Logistikprozesse und kombiniert diese mit Empfehlungen und Wissen von Experten, die unsere Produkte in der Praxis täglich anwenden. 

Wir verfolgen das Ziel, Ihren wirtschaftlichen Erfolg permanent zu unterstützen. Und das jeden Tag aufs Neue.

Qualität und überdurchschnittlicher persönlicher Service gehören für uns zusammen.

Höchste Qualität unseres chirurgischen Nahtmaterials und seine sichere und einfache Anwendung sind Merkmale der von SABANA hergestellten und vertriebenen Produkte.

Die Qualitätssicherung bei der SABANA Medizinbedarf GmbH stellt sicher, dass alle regulatorische Anforderungen sowie anzuwendende Gesetze und Normen beachtet und erfüllt werden.

Das Qualitätsmanagementsystem von SABANA Medizinbedarf GmbH wird regelmäßig gemäß der Norm DIN EN ISO 13485 durch den TÜV SÜD überprüft.

Name: Distriam
Description:
Há 27 anos conectamos pessoas, empresas e negócios no Brasil! Somos a principal ponte entre os laboratórios farmacêuticos e farmácias e drogarias de Minas Gerais, consolidando boas relações e fortalecendo a saúde da população de todo o estado.

Nossa história teve início em 1996 na cidade de Uberlândia/MG, atuando como distribuidora exclusiva dos produtos EMS – a maior farmacêutica no Brasil –, em toda a região do Triângulo Mineiro. Participamos ativamente da maior revolução do mercado farmacêutico, que se deu com o início da produção dos medicamentos genéricos no Brasil e, consequentemente, com a sua introdução no mercado nacional.

Ao longo da nossa trajetória, crescemos e expandimos. Hoje, trabalhamos com um portfólio das melhores marcas de medicamentos similares e genéricos, além das principais marcas do mercado em produtos correlatos, de higiene e beleza, produtos ortopédicos e equipamentos eletrônicos de monitoramento e cuidados com a saúde.

Além do centro administrativo em Uberlândia, contamos também com um centro de distribuição em Contagem, Minas Gerais, possibilitando a nossa atuação em todo o estado – com mais agilidade, eficiência e qualidade. Nossa estrutura comercial contempla quatro canais de vendas diferentes, facilitando e aprimorando a experiência de compra de nossos clientes, com um atendimento personalizado e ágil.

A Distriam tem orgulho de sua sólida trajetória e mantém como norte a construção de um futuro cada vez mais brilhante, tendo como premissas: a excelência no atendimento aos clientes, a valorização e desenvolvimento de nossos colaboradores e uma visão inovadora, aprimorando, cada dia mais, o desenvolvimento de nossos negócios.

Creemos que cuidar de las personas es una forma de transformar, y estamos aquí para hacerlo posible.

Name: INLINEA PHARMA
Description:
Inlinea è una giovane Azienda, dinamica ed in continua evoluzione che opera nel settore nutraceutico con l’obiettivo di restituire alla fitoterapia e all’informazione medico scientifica la dignità e la rilevanza che ad essa spettano, attraverso la creazione e diffusione di prodotti innovativi, sicuri
e di altissima qualità che si adattino alle esigenze di soggetti di tutte le età.
Negli ultimi anni Inlinea ha brevettato tre prodotti ideati e formulati in collaborazione con esperti nel settore, Calmì, Enavit Sudamin e CalmOral.

Inlinea was founded in 2001 in Livorno by Silvano Puccinelli, the former CEO. The company has a rich history in the healthcare sector, dating back to Silvano's grandfather, who was the first pharmaceutical wholesaler in Livorno. Silvano's father, Libero Puccinelli, was an early pioneer in medical scientific information and experimented with pharmaceutical deposits.
Recognizing the need for new tools in the medical profession, particularly in pediatrics, Silvano founded Inlinea. This was the beginning of our long journey. Inlinea is a dynamic and constantly evolving company operating in the nutraceutical sector. Our aim is to raise the status and relevance of phytotherapy and medical-scientific information through the creation and dissemination of innovative, safe and high-quality products for people of all ages.
In recent years, Inlinea has patented three products, Calmi, Enavit Sudamin and CalmOral, designed and formulated in collaboration with experts in the field. Our focus is on the science of nutrition and functional nutrition, with a particular emphasis on children's health. We select active ingredients to ensure our products are of the highest quality. All manufacturing standards are adhered to, and thorough checks are carried out throughout the production cycle. This ensures that our products meet the highest standards of quality and safety.

Name: Digifarma
Description:
Somos una asociación de farmacias con más de 16 años de experiencia en la gestión profesional, uniendo el conocimiento de farmacéuticos y expertos del ámbito empresarial. Nos enfocamos en proporcionar servicios integrales que mejoran la rentabilidad, eficiencia y crecimiento de las farmacias.
¿Por qué unirse a Digifarma?
Nos distingue es nuestra experiencia y el valor que aportamos a nuestras farmacias socias, logrando que permanezcan con nosotros a largo plazo gracias a beneficios tangibles y un enfoque colaborativo.
¿Qué hacemos para apoyar a las farmacias?
•	Negociación y Compras Optimizadas: Gestionamos acuerdos con los mejores laboratorios del sector, garantizando un amplio surtido de productos a precios competitivos. Este servicio reduce el tiempo dedicado a compras, minimiza la falta de stock y las caducidades, y mejora la rentabilidad de tu farmacia.
•	Tecnología y Gestión Avanzada: Contamos con un CRM 360 y una herramienta de Business Intelligence que aportan transparencia y calidad en la gestión. Las farmacias pueden compararse anónimamente con otras del grupo para mejorar su desempeño. Además, ofrecemos consultoría especializada para optimizar la rentabilidad.
•	Aula Digifarma - Formación Continua: Desde consejo farmacéutico hasta gestión fiscal y de Recursos Humanos. 
•	Marca Digifarma: Ofrecemos una línea de productos premium exclusiva para nuestras farmacias asociadas. Estos productos generan alta rentabilidad y ayudan a fidelizar clientes, al ser exclusivos del grupo
•	Marketing Exclusivo: Desarrollamos campañas comerciales exclusivas. 
•	Servicios Complementarios: Colaboramos con las mejores empresas del sector en áreas como mobiliario de farmacia, robótica, LOPD, y consultoría de gestión y fiscal. 
Fomentamos el apoyo mutuo entre farmacias con nuestra intranet y apps, creando un entorno colaborativo. Con el Premio Almirez de Oro, premiamos el compromiso. En Digifarma, impulsamos innovación y crecimiento para nuestras farmacias.

Name: Biomedical Pharmatics
Description:
Biomedical Pharmatics è una realtà italiana specializzata nella distribuzione di farmaci, dispositivi medici e presidi ospedalieri, con un'attenzione particolare ai settori della medicina estetica e della dermatologia avanzata.

Attraverso una rete consolidata e in continua espansione, Biomedical Pharmatics fornisce prodotti selezionati ad alto profilo qualitativo, destinati a cliniche, studi medici, ospedali e farmacie. L’offerta include farmaci etici, anestetici locali, filler dermici, biostimolanti, peeling, fili, e soluzioni ad alto valore aggiunto per la pratica quotidiana del medico estetico.

Accanto all’attività distributiva, l’azienda ha sviluppato un polo formativo professionale accreditato, con corsi ECM rivolti a medici e operatori sanitari. Il ramo educativo Biomedical Academy propone workshop teorico-pratici, eventi live e sessioni hands-on per offrire aggiornamento costante sulle tecniche più innovative, in collaborazione con opinion leader e formatori qualificati.

Biomedical Pharmatics si distingue per affidabilità, rapidità nella consegna e supporto consulenziale. La missione è offrire un servizio completo che va dalla fornitura dei migliori prodotti alla formazione continua, contribuendo alla crescita professionale dei nostri clienti e al benessere dei loro pazienti.

 Sede operativa: Italia
 Servizio B2B in tutta Europa
 Corsi ECM e formazione specializzata
 Prodotti per medicina estetica e ospedaliera

Description:
Visando às necessidades das empresas de montarem e abastecerem seus ambulatórios médicos e à quase inexistência de fornecedores especializados nesse tipo de atendimento, seu sócio-fundador, profissional com mais de 15 anos de experiência na área médico-hospitalar, motivou-se a iniciar as atividades da MEDSERV em 1989, contando com apenas cinco pessoas, em São Bernardo do Campo, em uma pequena área alugada.

Crescemos e evoluímos ao longo desses 35 anos e hoje temos uma sede própria, com projetos de expansão, sempre procurando melhorar nossa estrutura de estocagem.

Contamos atualmente com mais de 50 colaboradores e buscamos constantemente o aprimoramento e a capacitação de toda nossa equipe por meio de profissionais técnicos que promovem regularmente cursos e palestras sobre os mais variados temas, sempre voltados ao crescimento profissional e pessoal de nossos colaboradores.

Nossa história vem sendo construída ao longo desses anos com muita solidez, conquistando todas licenças necessárias e o respeito e a preferência de nossos clientes.

Los negocios de Laboratorios SMB Farma S.A. se sustentan principalmente a través de la receta médica.

Hemos trabajado durante todos estos años, para construir un ambiente de confianza mutua con nuestros colaboradores, pacientes, médicos, clientes, y proveedores, y hemos participado en innumerables actividades de las sociedades médicas, hemos colaborado con el desarrollo de las especialidades donde participamos y hemos puesto especial esfuerzo para que nuestra operación esté siempre enmarcada en estrictas normas éticas.

A principios de los años 90´s y derivado de una iniciativa empresarial, inicia la historia de lo que hoy conocemos como Farmacias Klyns.

Buscando aprovechar lo que en aquel momento se presentaba dentro de la economía mexicana y particularmente en el ramo farmacéutico: márgenes atractivos, así como el manejo sencillo y práctico en el abasto y en la administración de inventarios; generando así una oportunidad de mercado y convirtiéndose en un nicho interesante por explotar.

Posteriormente y en base a lo que el mercado requería, se comenzaron a manejar 2 conceptos de tienda: Medexx y Klyns. Nuestros comienzos se dieron con 2 sucursales: Constitución y Revolución, siendo la primera a la fecha parte de nuestros más de 50 puntos de venta con que actualmente contamos.

Sabedores de que los mejores años están por venir y teniendo como pilar de consolidación y crecimiento a cada uno de nuestros colaboradores, afrontamos el reto y oportunidad de un futuro lleno de logros y metas.

 Commandes automatisées en cas de rupture

 Meilleure circulation des médicaments sur le territoire

ExpePharma, c’est un outil né du terrain, pour répondre à une réalité quotidienne : faciliter l’accès aux bons médicaments, au bon moment.

#Pharmacie #Rupturesdestock #Grossisteseépartiteurs #Santé #Distributionpharmaceutique #Innovation #ExpePharma

En los años '70, Droguería Santa Lucia alcanza una cobertura casi total del mercado salvadoreño y se posiciona como la distribuidora de producto ético más grande, en el país. En los '90, DSL continúa siendo líder en la distribución de producto ético. Gracias a su experiencia en el mercado y la relación construida con sus proveedores.

A mediados de esta década se decide ampliar el negocio de la empresa incorporando nuevas categorías de productos a su cartera, logrando así atender la creciente demanda del mercado comercial y de consumo en todo el país.

Per noi la qualità è al centro sia per quanto riguarda i prodotti ed i servizi offerti sia rispetto alla vita in azienda.

	Continuità e monitoraggio dei processi

in C&N siamo consapevoli del delicato ruolo svolto per la sicurezza dei prodotti forniti e garantiamo il controllo di tutti gli aspetti che la possono condizionare: 
	Controllo delle forniture
	Tracciabilità 
	Procedura di ritiro dal mercato

C&N è un grossista farmaceutico a 360° in contatto quotidiano con i propri fornitori per supportare i clienti nelle loro necessità riducendo al massimo i tempi di attesa. 
o	LOGISTICA 
C&N, di concerto con i clienti, organizza e monitora  trasporti dedicati con l’ utilizzo di mezzi idonei e imballaggi validati, garantendo consegne puntuali a temperatura controllata.
o	SERVIZIO INFORMAZIONI 
Un team di professionisti è a disposizione per recepire le richieste dei  partner e per fornire informazioni tecniche e commerciali. 
o	ORGANIZZAZIONE AZIENDALE:
C&N è dotata di un manuale della qualità e un ha un organigramma semplice che definisce tutti i ruoli e le responsabilità. I ruoli chiave sono interni all’azienda.

Description:
OrPha Swiss ist eine Schweizer Pharmafirma, die sich vor allem auf die medikamentöse Therapie von seltenen Erkrankungen (sog. Orphan Diseases) fokussiert sowie auf Medikamente, die in der Schweiz «verwaist» sind oder lediglich Nischenbereiche abdecken.

Unser Schwerpunkt liegt auf den Therapiegebieten Hämato-Onkologie, pulmonale Hypertonie, Infektiologie sowie Intensiv- und Notfallmedizin. Unsere Priorität liegt auf herausragender Produktqualität sowie zuverlässigen und hoch qualifizierten Herstellern.

Als Spezialist für seltene Erkrankungen legen wir besonderen Wert auf umfassende Serviceleistungen für unsere Kundschaft im Dienste der Patienten/-innen. Dazu gehören eine gute Erreichbarkeit und Unterstützung der Fachpersonen vor Ort.

Oberstes Ziel für uns ist es, das Leben von Patienten/-innen nachhaltig zu verbessern. Unsere hochmotivierten und speziell geschulten Mitarbeitenden gewährleisten, dass den behandelnden Fachpersonen sichere und wirksame Medikamente zur Verfügung stehen, um ihnen bei der Behandlung betroffener Personen zu helfen.

Das Team von OrPha Swiss besteht aus nur wenigen, aber hochqualifizierten Mitarbeitenden, die durch externe Consultants bei Bedarf unterstützt werden.

Wir pflegen ein umfangreiches Netzwerk aus nationalen und internationalen Unternehmen sowie Fachpersonen im Gesundheitsbereich. Diese wertvollen Beziehungen ermöglichen es uns, innovative Lösungen zu entwickeln und hochwertige Produkte anzubieten, die das Wohl der Patienten/-innen in den Mittelpunkt stellen.

OrPha Swiss positioniert sich zudem auch als kompetenter Geschäftspartner für andere Pharmafirmen mit dem Ziel, wichtige Arzneimittel weiterhin in der Schweiz anbieten zu können. Wir wollen verhindern, dass zunehmend Medikamente in der Schweiz aus kommerziellen Gründen abregistriert werden, die dann teuer und aufwendig wieder importiert werden müssen.

Name: Maghreb Medical Maintenance
Description:
Bienvenue chez Maghreb Medical Maintenance (MMM) !

Depuis notre fondation en 1993, nous nous sommes engagés à être votre partenaire privilégié dans la vente et la distribution d'équipements et de réactifs dans les domaines médicaux, industriels et pharmaceutiques. Notre expertise et notre engagement envers l'excellence ont fait de nous l'une des sociétés leaders dans ce secteur en Tunisie.

Chez MMM, nous comprenons l'importance cruciale de la fiabilité et de la qualité des équipements et des réactifs dans le domaine de la recherche et des analyses. C'est pourquoi nous nous efforçons de vous fournir des produits de la plus haute qualité, provenant de marques renommées et reconnues sur le marché.

Nous nous engageons à offrir un service complet à nos clients. En plus de la vente et de la distribution, nous fournissons également un service après-vente de premier ordre. Cela comprend la livraison rapide et sécurisée des produits, l'installation professionnelle par nos techniciens qualifiés et la maintenance régulière pour garantir un fonctionnement optimal de vos équipements.

Mais notre engagement ne s'arrête pas là. Nous croyons fermement à l'importance de la formation continue dans le domaine scientifique et professionnel. C'est pourquoi nous proposons également des programmes de formation personnalisés pour nos clients. Nos experts qualifiés se feront un plaisir de partager leur savoir-faire et leurs connaissances approfondies avec vous, vous permettant ainsi de rester à la pointe de votre domaine.

Chez MMM, nous sommes fiers de notre engagement envers la satisfaction de nos clients. Nous travaillons en étroite collaboration avec vous pour comprendre vos besoins spécifiques et vous fournir des solutions adaptées. Notre équipe dévouée est toujours prête à vous assister, répondre à vos questions et vous offrir un soutien continu.

Nous sommes là pour vous accompagner à chaque étape de votre parcours scientifique et professionnel.

Name: RIVERPHARMA LTD
Description:
At Riverpharma, we specialize in pharmaceutical sourcing, distribution, and consulting, with a primary focus on orphan drugs, medicines on shortage lists, and unlicensed pharmaceutical supplies. We provide tailored solutions to meet the unique needs of healthcare professionals, including Named Patient Programs, clinical trial supplies, and urgent medical demand management. Our expertise lies in sourcing and supplying hard-to-find medicines and rare treatments for various healthcare sectors.

Our Expertise

 Clinical Trials – Comprehensive services, including comparator sourcing and supply.

 Named Patient Programs – Facilitating access to commercially approved medicines unavailable in specific countries.

 Hospital & Pharmacy Unlicensed Supply – Providing medicines that are unlicensed, unavailable, or experiencing shortages.

 Marine Medical Supplies – Sourcing essential medicines and medical kits for ships, cruise liners, and air travel.

 IVF Medications – Offering competitive access to fertility treatments and reproductive healthcare products.

 Orphan Drugs – Specialized expertise in sourcing medicines for rare diseases, ensuring access through GDP-certified suppliers in the EU, USA, and Canada.

At Riverpharma, our mission is to bridge the gap in healthcare accessibility, ensuring healthcare providers and organizations receive the essential medicines they need.

E buscando ser reconhecida pelos clientes e pela indústria farmacêutica como referência em distribuição desses produtos, em 2010, a Oregon expandiu sua infraestrutura, inaugurando uma filial no estado do Espírito Santo, e em 2014 expandiu sua logística passando a vender medicamentos para todo território nacional.

A partir desta expansão, empregos diretos e indiretos foram gerados e o quadro de colaboradores (as) da Oregon cresceu, contando, a organização, hoje, com um grupo de pessoas que contribuem diretamente para o seu sucesso, trabalhando de forma comprometida em sua área de atuação, sendo esta administrativa, financeira, compras, vendas ou logística.

Ser Oregon significa trabalhar com seriedade em cada etapa do processo, com foco no cliente interno e externo e sempre com ética, respeito, agilidade e qualidade, buscando crescimento contínuo e responsável.

Parallel zu unseren Großhandelsaktivitäten arbeiten wir auch als Logistik-Dienstleister für Unternehmen der pharmazeutischen Industrie. Mit über 1.000 qm Lagerflächen, Kühlräumen, bester Verkehrsanbindung sowie einem geschulten und engagierten Team ist Max Pharma ein kompetenter Logistikpartner für pharmazeutische Hersteller.
Unsere Ziele / Vision
Zuverlässiger Partner unserer Kunden
Qualität, Zuverlässigkeit und schnelle Reaktion auf Kundenwünsche sind die Prinzipien unserer Arbeit. Sie sind die Grundlage, warum unsere Kunden uns vertrauen, und führen zu langjährigen Partnerschaften.

Neue Ideen, innovative Lösungen
Darüber hinaus bringen wir unser Know-how ein, um gemeinsam mit Kooperationspartnern neue Lösungen zu entwickeln und marktgerecht anzubieten. Im Bereich der Gesundheit, der medizinischen Versorgung und der Pharma-Logistik gibt es überall Ansatzpunkte, um Vorhandenes besser zu gestalten und ganz Neues anzugehen. Die Welt braucht noch viele gute Ideen – gerne auch unkonventioneller Art.

We help forecast demand for your segment, negotiate volume pricing and ensure availability when drug is being rationed. We work closely with the anesthesiologists across Canada to keep up to date on current best practices in your specialized field.

Our products Passed SGS plasticizer and heavy metal content tests, meet standards of YBB, USP and EP. Non-sterile and sterilization  medical packing Tyvek/HDPE Breath Bag, pharmaceutical low density polythene (LDPE) film and bag,and bio-pharmaceutical single use customized system (SUS). Pharmaceutical  LDPE aseptic film are pioneers in the province. Name: INKAR
Description:
INKAR сфокусирована на сегменте оптовой реализации качественных лекарственных средств, изделий медицинского назначения, медицинской техники, биологически активных добавок, лечебной косметики, продукции для детей, детского питания. Компания основана в 1998 году.
Сегодня INKAR:
- Системообразующее предприятие в сфере Здравоохранения Республики Казахстан
- Национальный дистрибьютор- №1 в стране по доле рынка (по данным Viortis)
INKAR покрывает всю территорию Казахстана (13 филиалов во всех крупных городах), а также у нас имеется 1 дочернее предприятие в Кыргызстане. 
В 2014 г. завершено строительство и введен в эксплуатацию новый современный Логистический Центр в г.Алматы (ЛЦ).
ЛЦ оснащен автоматической конвейерной линией SSI SCHÄFER, модулем автоматической сборки PEMAT, TMS системой RELOG, автоботами и другими новейшими технологиями, что позволяет обеспечивать высокую скорость комплектации заказов и качество сервиса для клиентов. До 90% входящих заказов мы доставляем в течении 24 часов.
В 2020 году мы повторно получили сертификат на соответствие GDP (Good distribution Practice), что подтверждает высокую эффективность нашей СМК (системы менеджмента качества).
ЛЦ в г. Алматы выполняет роль распределительного центра, откуда ежедневно на собственном и наемном транспорте осуществляется отгрузка медикаментов на весь Казахстан.

Name: MEDITESCA
Description:
Representaciones Medites, C. A. es una empresa farmacéutica legalmente establecida en Venezuela, técnicamente autorizada por las autoridades competentes para la comercialización de medicamentos al mayor, destinados a prevenir, diagnosticar, aliviar o curar enfermedades en seres humanos dirigidos al sector salud, público y privado, ambulatorio y hospitalario, masivos y alto costo.

Contamos con permisología ante la Contraloría Sanitaria del Ministerio del Poder Popular para la Salud: Casa  de Representación y Droguería.

En Meditesca nuestra prioridad es atender las necesidades de nuestros clientes sin comprometer los principios básicos de nuestra profesión, en la prevención de las enfermedades, así como en la promoción y restitución de la salud a través del acceso a los productos farmacéuticos.

Tenemos más de 23 años de experiencia en la compra, venta, almacenamiento, distribución y comercialización de productos farmacéuticos de reconocidos laboratorios nacionales y trasnacionales.

Además, tenemos 5 años de experiencia en la representación, registro, importación, distribución y comercialización de medicamentos, productos naturales y cosméticos legalmente registrados por nosotros en el país.

Somos una empresa vanguardista. Siempre pensando en nuestros clientes, Meditesca en cualquiera de sus unidades de negocios, se encuentra en la búsqueda de nuevas oportunidades de mercado, productos innovadores o de vanguardia, tanto de marca como genéricos, con los máximos estándares de calidad, productos propios, o de alianzas comerciales internacionales que permitan mejorar el portafolio de productos.

Nuestra Misión es satisfacer la demanda de medicamentos terapéuticos esenciales mediante la representación y comercialización en Venezuela, brindando atención eficiente y responsable,  proporcionando el óptimo balance entre calidad y precio.

Name: MEDICAL SRL
Description:
Medical SRL è un’azienda calabrese nata a Sellia Marina (Catanzaro) nel 2017. La società nasce con lo scopo di offrire al settore sanitario prodotti di avanzata tecnologia e servizi di alta funzionalità. Il focus è basato sulla commercializzazione di prodotti elettromedicali e monouso per laboratori su tutto il territorio nazionale. Con gli anni si è pensato di ampliare gli orizzonti per ottemperare alle esigenze del mercato, estendendo l’attività alla rappresentanza, commercializzazione e distribuzione di dispositivi medici, apparecchiature elettromedicali, arredi ospedalieri e servizi sanitari specialistici in molteplici settori. Medical lavora per fornire prodotti di prima qualità e si impegna a garantire un ottimo servizio, con particolare attenzione alla completa soddisfazione del cliente, alla vendita di prodotti innovativi, alla costante ricerca e scoperta di nuove proposte e al miglioramento della propria organizzazione interna.

Medical può contare su un elevato standard di qualità e affidabilità grazie all’esperienza sul campo, ad una conoscenza profonda del territorio, del mercato e dei prodotti, che hanno permesso all’azienda di crescere in termini di servizi forniti, nella capacità gestionale e di organizzazione, nella cura delle relazioni con i clienti, per garantire sempre il massimo grado di soddisfazione e il miglioramento continuo dell’efficienza dei servizi e del loro livello di qualità.

Description:
Contact US. WhatsApp/Wechat: +8801979742002

Welcome to Well Being Drugs, a leading name in the pharmaceutical industry dedicated to enhancing global health through the export of high-quality generic medicines. Established in [Year], our company has swiftly evolved into a reliable partner for healthcare providers, distributors, and patients worldwide.

Mission:
At Well Being Drugs, our mission is to make essential medicines accessible to diverse populations, fostering well-being across borders. We are committed to supplying cost-effective generic medications without compromising on quality, ensuring that people around the globe have access to affordable healthcare solutions.

Quality Assurance:
Our commitment to quality is unwavering. Well Being Drugs adheres to rigorous international standards and regulatory requirements, ensuring that each product meets or exceeds the expectations of healthcare authorities. We source our pharmaceuticals from reputable manufacturers, conducting thorough quality control checks to guarantee the efficacy and safety of every medication we export.

Global Reach:
Well Being Drugs operates on a global scale, reaching out to healthcare providers, pharmacies, and distributors in various countries. Our diverse product portfolio spans across therapeutic areas such as cardiovascular health, infectious diseases, oncology, and more. With a focus on affordability, we aim to bridge the healthcare gap, making a positive impact on communities worldwide.

Innovation and Research:
Staying ahead in the dynamic pharmaceutical landscape, Well Being Drugs invests in research and development to introduce innovative solutions. We collaborate with cutting-edge research institutions and pharmaceutical partners to bring novel formulations to the market, addressing emerging healthcare challenges.

Name: Astrid Twardy GmbH
Description:
Mit einem sicheren Gespür für die Anforderungen an den Gesundheitsmarkt wurde die Astrid Twardy GmbH vor über 60 Jahren gegründet und vertreibt seitdem ihre Produkte in Deutschland und Österreich ausschließlich über Apotheken. Seit 1960 arbeitet die Astrid Twardy GmbH nach der Maxime: „Im Dienst an der Gesundheit des Menschen“. Heute steht eine neue Generation von dynamischen Mitarbeiterinnen und Mitarbeitern für dieses Leitbild und seine Weiterführung ein.

Gerade in der heutigen Zeit ist die Erhaltung der Gesundheit unser höchstes Gut. Schon in der Antike war der Zusammenhang zwischen Ernährung und Gesundheit bekannt. Der auch heute nach wie vor aktuelle Satz des griechischen Arztes Hippokrates verdeutlicht dies: „Eure Nahrungsmittel sollen eure Heilmittel sein und eure Heilmittel sollen eure Nahrungsmittel sein.“

Name: Xi'an Lyna Bio-Tech Co., Ltd.
Description:
Xi'an Lyna Bio-Tech Co., Ltd. is a leading plant extracts and herbal medicine manufacturer, located in Chang'an District, Xi'an, Shaanxi Province, China. It is a modern high-tech company dedicated to the biomedical health industry. We specialize in R&D, production and sales of functional ingredients such as plant extracts, food and beverage additives, pharmaceutical raw material intermediates, cosmetic raw materials, and feed additives. The company mainly focus on the research of men's sex health products, raw materials for women's skin whitening, weight loss and natural pigments.  All products relevant technical standards, process flow documents, sales solutionsand industry latest information are provided.

LYNA prossess one plant extract factory with GMP work standard ,one laboratory and one planting base with herbal raw material, full equipped with production, experiment, test and storage facilities. It owns eight 6-ton multifunctional extracting tanks, high-efficiency concentrating tower, resin adsorbing column, spray drying tower, which is capable to process more than 6000 tons plant materials annually. It uses e-business thinking pattern to operate traditional enterprises. Through establishing close academic exchanges and scientific research with three scientific research institutes, it is committed to building a modernized management with professional technical team.

LYNA main products includes Marigold extract, Ginseng extract, Epimedium extract, Phycocyanin, Nervonic acid, Reishi mushroom extract, Thaumatin. LYNA has established stable trade relationship with customers over 40 countries. They adhere to the "People-oriented, Innovation and Win-win" core values, provide high-quality products and perfect after-sales service protection, upholds professional, efficient, honest, high-quality work attitude, sincerely serves every customer with 24 hours.

Name: SIMAR NATURPHARMA SL
Description:
En SIMAR NATURPHARMA, pensamos que Naturaleza y Salud van de la mano
Por eso, nos centramos en ofrecerle productos de origen natural con la máxima eficacia terapéutica, principalmente a base de plantas alimentarias y medicinales, con una posología fácil y un respaldo científico detrás de cada componente avalando su eficacia y seguridad.

Nuestros productos se distribuyen en Farmacias, y su presentación está centrada en evitar cualquier elemento decorativo o superfluo en el embalaje, asegurando a la vez una máxima estabilidad del producto.

SIMAR NATURPHARMA es un laboratorio de complementos alimenticios y productos naturales que nace con la vocación de aprovechar al máximo lo que la Naturaleza nos ofrece, con la ilusión de contribuir a la mejora de la Salud de todos nuestros clientes.

VADEMECUM
¿QUÉ ES DOLREDUX ARTICULACIONES?
Dolredux Articulaciones es un complemento alimenticio que aporta vitamina D3, manganeso y extractos de origen natural, orientado para ayudar a nuestro organismo a mantener el bienestar de las articulaciones.

¿QUÉ ES LIBRACOL?
Libracol es un complemento alimenticio con el complejo LEVASANOL COMPLEX (Berberina, levadura roja de arroz y policosanol), coenzima Q10, fitoesteroles vegetales y vitamina B3.
¿QUÉ ES SIMARFORT?
Complemento alimenticio a base de extractos secos estandarizados de raíz de equinácea, rodiola, maitake y cúrcuma, con vitamina D3 y pimienta negra. Con el complejo original ECHIGLUCAN.

Formulación orientada a ayudar a regular las defensas de forma natural.

- Nahrungsergänzungsmittel

Name: RD Pharma
Description:
"RD Pharma" operates as a marketing company in Georgia, focusing on sourcing high-quality, European-made medications, dietary supplements, and medical devices. The company establishes direct contacts with manufacturers, imports selected products into Georgia, and carries out the necessary marketing activities for their distribution. Staffed with highly skilled professionals, the company ensures thorough market demand analysis and the proper planning and execution of marketing strategies essential for the successful sale of imported products. The company was founded on the following principles:

• Importing high-quality medications and dietary supplements into Georgia.

• Ensuring the accessibility of these medications and supplements.

• Gaining the trust of the medical community. Current highlights:

• "RD Pharma" employs over 15 professionals.

• The company's portfolio includes 2 medications and 8 dietary supplements.

• Representation and offices are located across Georgia.

• The company's products are available in both chain and independent pharmacies.

• "RD Pharma" partners with European pharmaceutical companies that adhere to FDA (U.S.), GMP (European), and ISO standards.

The success and growth of "RD Pharma" each year are driven by its creative and dedicated team. The company consistently focuses on motivating its employees and enhancing their qualifications, actively participating in significant medical events on a daily basis. It organizes various meetings, presentations, and large-scale events to introduce new developments and innovations, all of which are key to the company's progress and success.

"RD Pharma" collaborates with numerous clinical and educational institutions, as well as with all leading clinics and specialists throughout Georgia. The company's mission is to raise public awareness in preventive medicine and to contribute to the creation of a diverse range of innovative, high-quality, and safe pharmaceutical products in the country.

Name: Farmavet srl
Description:
La Farmavet s.r.l. si occupa da più di 50 anni di articoli per uso veterinario. Tutto è iniziato a Colmurano, un delizioso paesino dell’entroterra maceratese, con Anita Matteucci (Dott.ssa farmacista) ed il marito Afro Strappolini (Dott. veterinario); ma è solo con l’avvento della collaborazione della loro figlia, la Dott.ssa Patrizia Strappolini, e di suo marito, il Dott. Stefano Calamanti, che nasce la Farmavet s.r.l. Inizialmente l’attività consisteva esclusivamente nella distribuzione farmaco veterinaria alle aziende zootecniche della Regione Marche. Successivamente, con l’apertura del secondo punto vendita presso Urbisaglia in un edificio di 1.800 mq, il business aziendale si è ampliato anche alla produzione di integratori e mangimi complementari ed alla commercializzazione di alimenti, prodotti per l’igiene, antiparassitari, accessori ed attrezzatura in genere per animali da compagnia e cavalli.

Oggi l’azienda dispone di personale altamente qualificato e distribuisce i propri prodotti sia in tutta Italia che all’estero; allo stesso tempo mantiene una “vocazione familiare” con particolare attenzione alla cura del cliente.

Si garantisce assistenza completa in ogni fase del processo lavorativo
Si danno consigli senza mai dimenticare le esigenze del cliente
Si propongono soluzioni per costruire un solido e duraturo rapporto professionale

Name: I.M. Lehmann Herne GmbH
Description:
Die Gründung der Firma I.M. LEHMANN GmbH erfolgte 1978 als Pharma- und Medizinprodukte-Handelsgesellschaft in Wetter (Ruhr). 
Die I.M. LEHMANN GmbH wurde 2014 durch die PPM-Medical Holding-Gruppe übernommen und stellt einen komplementären Geschäftszweig zu den anderen Unternehmen der Holding dar. 
Die Kundenstruktur besteht hauptsächlich aus Apotheken und dem pharmazeutischen Großhandel. Schwerpunkte des Produktangebots stellen der Diabetikerbedarf, die Continence-Care sowie die Wundversorgung dar.
Kundenzufriedenheit und Verlässlichkeit sind zwei wesentliche Merkmale der Geschäftsphilosophie. 
I.M. LEHMANN Herne GmbH verfügt über die Großhandelserlaubnis nach § 52a AMG, ausgestellt am 14.02.2017 von der Bezirksregierung Arnsberg, und die Zertifizierung nach DIN EN ISO 13485.

Name: Caamenihu Asbl
Description:
La Caamenihu est la Centrale d’achat et d’approvisionnement en médicaments essentiels du Nord de l’Ituri et du Haut Uélé, une centrale régionale de distribution de médicaments essentiels en République Démocratique du Congo (RDC). Située au Nord-Est de la RDC, près des frontières avec l’Ouganda et le Soudan du Sud, elle a été fondée en 2000 grâce à une collaboration entre l'Union Européenne, l'organisation Malteser International et le Diocèse de Mahagi-Nioka. La Caamenihu est une association à but non lucratif dont la mission est de garantir la disponibilité des médicaments essentiels aux populations.
La Caamenihu est membre de la Fédération des Centrales d’Approvisionnement en Médicaments Essentiels (FEDECAME). La mission de la FEDECAME est de centraliser les achats de médicaments essentiels au niveau national et de décentraliser leur distribution via des Centres de Distribution Régionaux (CDR) tels que la Caamenihu. La FEDECAME acquiert des médicaments et consommables médicaux sur les marchés international et local, et effectue des achats groupés pour profiter des économies d’échelle sur les coûts d’acquisition et logistiques.
La Caamenihu couvre 4 territoires et 17 zones de santé, desservant une population de 3,2 millions de personnes. L’organisation emploie 44 agents et gère deux dépôts pharmaceutiques, dont le principal a une capacité de 12 000 m³. La Caamenihu détient un contrat de service avec le Ministère de la Santé (Programme National d’Approvisionnement en Médicaments) dans le cadre d’un partenariat public-privé. En tant qu’association à but non lucratif, la Caamenihu approvisionne uniquement les structures étatiques, les ONG (contrats d’entreposage et de stockage) et les programmes nationaux, notamment ceux de lutte contre le paludisme et la tuberculose.

La Caamenihu prend plus d’ampleur et occupe aujourd’hui le statut de ‘porte d’entrée’ en RDC. Les portes d’entrée sont au nombre de quatre et sont des acteurs majeurs du système national d’approvisionne

Name: Dana Estrella
Description:
ТОО «DANA ESTRELLA» - торговая медицинская компания, основанная в 2004 году специалистами в области медицинского оборудования. Головной офис компании расположен в г. Алматы, Республика Казахстан. Филиал компании находится в г. Астана. Штат нашей компании составляют высококвалифицированные специалисты в составе более 50 человек.

Основной деятельностью компании является реализация изделий медицинского назначения и медицинской техники, современных медицинских технологий в области: кардиохирургии, интервенционной кардиохирургии и сосудистой нейрохирургии, аритмологии и диагностики, общей хирургии, травматологии и ортопедии, стерилизации и лабораторий, а также медицинской техники в различных направлениях.

Целевой рынок и клиенты:

Государственные медицинские учреждения и клиники
Частные медицинские центры
Лаборатории
 

И еще…
Наша компания постоянно находится в поиске новых решений, инноваций в области медицины. Кроме того, мы предоставляем широкий спектр сервисной поддержки для наших заказчиков, включающий тренинг, техническую поддержку, проведение инновационных мастер-классов и т.п.


Девиз компании: Яркая, здоровая жизнь вместе с Dana Estrella


Цели компании:

Развитие и расширение деятельности компании в сфере поставок современного медицинского оборудования и расходного материала медицинским учреждениям Казахстана для улучшения качества оказания медицинских услуг населению.
Продвижение медицинских инноваций в Казахстане.
 

Миссия компании:
Способствовать развитию здравоохранения Казахстана, путем внедрения новейших инновационных решений, поставки изделий медицинского назначения высокого качества и предоставления высокого уровня сервиса.

Name: Blue Door Pharmacies, LLC
Description:
Blue Door Pharmacies, LLC serves at the crossroads of innovation and community care. We are the Company operating both Blue Door Pharma and Shady Grove Pharmacy. One, a national distributor of pharmaceuticals in the biotech R&D space, and the other a leading local, family-focused independent pharmacy. One Company with two very different brands, but a unified commitment to superior service.

Located in the heart of Montgomery County, Maryland’s expansive biotech community, and with our nimble, responsive approach to conducting business, Blue Door Pharma has  become the “go to” supplier some of the largest players in the research space. Our current customer base consists primarily of US-based biotech companies that focus on pharmaceutical and biopharmaceutical research and development, and include some of the most prominent leaders in the industry, including AstraZeneca, Celgene and Teva. Given Blue Door Pharma’s strategic location, we also fill a critical role in supplying small and large companies with the materials and supplies they require - including pharmaceuticals, scientific equipment, instrumentation and consumables.

Despite our growth on the supplier side, we remain true to our beginnings. Blue Door Pharmacies, LLC continues to operate Shady Grove Pharmacy as our flagship customer-facing brick and mortar business – and one of the most successful independent pharmacies in Montgomery County. In additional to the standard off-the-shelf prescription medications, we are a fully equipped Compounding Pharmacy with a USP-797 compliant clean-room on site. We have non-resident pharmacy permits in eleven states and ship hundreds of compounded medications a week through our partnership with FedEx.

Name: WeiTai  Peptides Technology LLC
Description:
About Us

WeiTai Peptides Technology LLC is a dedicated manufacturer specializing in synthetic peptides, active pharmaceutical ingredients (APIs), and advanced intermediates. With cutting-edge facilities and an experienced scientific team, we provide reliable and innovative solutions that empower pharmaceutical companies, biotech innovators, and research organizations worldwide.

Products

Synthetic Peptides – Catalog and custom sequences for drug discovery, laboratory research, and biotech applications.

APIs – Produced under strict standards for safety, quality, and global compliance.

Advanced Intermediates – Tailored intermediates to accelerate R&D and commercial pipelines.

Services

Custom Peptide Synthesis – High-purity peptides (≥98%) with full analytical data (HPLC, MS, COA).

CMO – Flexible contract manufacturing, scaling from lab to pilot and commercial batches.

CDMO – Integrated development and manufacturing services supporting faster time-to-market.

Analytical Support – Rigorous quality testing ensuring traceability and reproducibility.

Strengths

Global Expertise – Serving partners across the US, Europe, and Asia with international standards.

Compliance – GMP-like operations, transparent processes, and reliable documentation.

Flexibility & Scale – Capable of supporting both small custom projects and large-volume supply.

Innovation – Advancing peptide platforms including APIs such as Semaglutide, Tirzepatide, Cagrilintide, and Retatrutide.

Vision

At WeiTai Peptides Technology LLC, our mission is to be a trusted global partner in peptide science. We are committed to delivering quality, reliability, and collaboration that help our clients achieve innovation and success in life sciences and beyond.

Name: つばめLabo
Description:
「世界の医療をボーダーレスにし、あらゆる人に届ける」をミッションに、インターネットを活用した医薬品の輸出入事業、医療・医薬品の情報提供サービス事業を展開しています。

医療大国と呼ばれる日本ですが、欧米で使えるものの国内で流通していない医薬品が多く存在するのをご存知でしょうか。例えば一部の感染症に関するワクチンは海外渡航者の需要があるにも関わらず、国内では供給が限定的であり入手困難なのが現状です。

つばめLaboでは、医薬品へのアクセスが安全かつ便利になるように、世界で有効性、安全性が認められている医薬品を見つけ、 安心して日本の医師の皆様にご利用いただけるよう、 海外及び日本の法令を遵守してお届けするサービスを展開しています。

現在、海外医薬品の取り扱いがある医療機関は一部に限られておりますが、今後アクセスを更に向上させることで日本全国どこに住んでいても、医療現場においてより多くの選択肢が生まれる環境づくりを目指しています。

Setiap produk yang kami sediakan adalah hasil dari upaya bersama antara HWI dan tim kami, yang selalu berkomitmen untuk memberikan yang terbaik. Kami percaya bahwa melalui pengalaman berbelanja dengan kami, Anda akan merasakan manfaat langsung dari keajaiban obat-obatan herbal yang kami sediakan.

Terima kasih telah memilih kami sebagai mitra kesehatan dan kecantikan Anda. Bersama-sama, mari kita wujudkan gaya hidup sehat dan bermakna melalui produk-produk herbal berkualitas dari PT. Healthwealth International.

Name: Mercy Waterloo Medical Center
Description:
Mercy Waterloo Medical Center is a medical center located in Waterloo, Iowa, United States. The medical center is part of the Mercy Health System. The medical center provides comprehensive medical services, including emergency care, surgery, hospitalization, obstetrics and gynecology, cardiology, neurology, orthopedics and many other specialties.

Since its founding in 1893, Mercy Waterloo Medical Center has been committed to providing high-quality medical care. The medical center has a dedicated team of healthcare professionals, including expert doctors, nurses and other health professionals, who are dedicated to providing individualized, comprehensive medical care to patients. The medical center works closely with the surrounding community to improve the health status of residents in the community and provides health education and preventive medical services.

Mercy Waterloo Medical Center is known for its mission of providing excellence in medical care and commitment to community health. It not only keeps innovating and improving in medical technology and facilities, but also actively participates in various community activities and charity projects to improve the well-being of the entire community.

As part of the Mercy Health System, Mercy Waterloo Medical Center upholds charity-based values with the goal of caring for the health of the entire community. It meets the needs of patients and the community by providing affordable medical services, care and support, and provides patients with a full range of personalized care.

İş ortakları ile uzun vadeli ve sağlam temellere dayanan bir iş birliği içinde bulunan Dorafarma "kalite" konusunu tüm iş süreçleri için göz önünde bulundurmaktadır.

Name: Medico Beautiful Technology GmbH
Description:
Medico Beautiful Technology GmbH to europejska marka premium, która dostarcza nie tylko nowoczesne urządzenia, ale przede wszystkim realne możliwości rozwoju dla gabinetów kosmetologicznych, klinik medycyny estetycznej oraz dystrybutorów poszukujących jakości i przewagi rynkowej.

Dlaczego Medico? Bo jesteśmy partnerem, który rozumie potrzeby branży – od innowacyjnych technologii, przez know-how w sprzedaży usług, aż po skuteczny marketing i szkolenia. Nasza oferta obejmuje m.in. nowatorską technologię Nozone Cold Plasma (NCP) – bezpieczną, skuteczną i wielozadaniową, która już dziś wyznacza nowe standardy w zabiegach na twarz, ciało, skórę głowy i w terapii skóry problematycznej.

Wyróżnia nas kompleksowe podejście. Oferując urządzenie, zapewniamy także szkolenie, gotowe procedury, wsparcie techniczne, graficzne materiały promocyjne i strategie sprzedażowe. Nasi partnerzy nie są zdani sami na siebie – wspólnie budujemy ich sukces.

Współpracujemy bezpośrednio z naukowcami i producentami z Korei Południowej, dzięki czemu mamy wpływ na rozwój technologii, dostęp do najnowszych rozwiązań i możliwość wdrażania produktów dopasowanych do europejskich rynków.

Działamy w oparciu o etykę, lojalność i długofalowe relacje – bo wierzymy, że prawdziwy rozwój to efekt zaufania i wspólnego celu. Jako Medico nie sprzedajemy obietnic – dostarczamy narzędzia, które realnie budują pozycję i rentowność naszych klientów.

Jeśli szukasz więcej niż sprzętu – jesteś we właściwym miejscu.

Mission: 
At Axiobai, our mission is to improve global access to essential pharmaceutical and medical goods by providing reliable and efficient wholesale distribution services. We strive to ensure that healthcare organizations, pharmacies, and medical professionals worldwide have access to safe, effective, and affordable healthcare products.

Product Portfolio:

Our extensive product portfolio includes branded and generic medications, over-the-counter drugs, medical devices and consumables as well as other healthcare essentials. Description:
La nostra azienda è il risultato di una combinazione unica di idee innovative, infrastrutture all’avanguardia, risorse finanziarie solide e attrezzature moderne, ma soprattutto della passione e dedizione delle persone che la compongono. Ogni membro del nostro team condivide una profonda vocazione per il settore veterinario, assumendosi con orgoglio la responsabilità di essere protagonisti e promotori della sua crescita e del suo sviluppo. Crediamo fermamente che il valore di un’azienda risieda nel contributo umano e nell’impegno collettivo verso un obiettivo comune.

La nostra missione è costruire una relazione autentica e di fiducia con i clienti, diventando non solo fornitori di prodotti e servizi, ma veri e propri partner. Ci distinguiamo per la nostra competenza, professionalità, la qualità del nostro servizio e un approccio trasparente e corretto che guida tutte le nostre attività. Offriamo soluzioni che uniscono prezzi competitivi, un’assistenza costante e una presenza affidabile, sempre orientate a soddisfare le esigenze del cliente.

Siamo determinati a creare un ambiente collaborativo e dinamico, dove il benessere degli animali e il supporto ai professionisti che si prendono cura di loro sono al centro di tutto ciò che facciamo. Con passione, responsabilità e dedizione, continuiamo a lavorare per essere un punto di riferimento nel settore veterinario e per garantire ai nostri clienti un servizio eccellente e impeccabile.

Somos mais que uma empresa de atacado e varejo. Somos importadores, distribuidores e entregadores de cuidado. Desde a negociação com fornecedores até a entrega no balcão ou na porta do cliente, cada etapa é guiada pelo compromisso com qualidade, agilidade e respeito.

Aqui, entendemos que cuidar começa dentro de casa. Por isso, valorizamos e apoiamos nossos colaboradores, investindo em um ambiente de trabalho que inspira crescimento, aprendizado e reconhecimento. Afinal, é o empenho de cada um que nos permite oferecer um atendimento humano e eficiente.

Nossa rotina é movimentada, desafiadora e cheia de propósito. Trabalhamos com paixão, buscando sempre superar expectativas e criar soluções que realmente façam diferença para quem está no outro lado do balcão ou recebendo o nosso delivery.

A Semear Group nasceu para conectar necessidades e soluções, mas cresceu para cultivar relacionamentos duradouros. É isso que nos torna únicos: a combinação entre excelência operacional e cuidado genuíno com as pessoas.

Semear Group — Crescendo juntos, cuidando sempre.

Description:
BioNix is a next-generation pharmaceutical powerhouse headquartered in the United Arab Emirates, driven by a singular mission: to revolutionize access to high-quality, life-critical medicines across the Middle East and Africa.

Rooted in precision, agility, and purpose, BioNix is more than just a distributor — we are strategic enablers of healthcare transformation. Our expertise spans across a uniquely curated portfolio, including hormonal therapies, hospital-critical medicines, complex and high-barrier-to-manufacture drugs, general pharmaceuticals, and rare Orphan drugs often unavailable in mainstream supply chains.

What makes BioNix distinct is our ability to bridge global pharmaceutical innovation with underserved regional demand — fast, compliantly, and at scale. Our robust logistics and regulatory infrastructure empowers us to navigate some of the most challenging supply gaps, ensuring that even the rarest medications reach those who need them most, without delay.

We partner with globally certified manufacturers and operate under the highest standards of quality assurance, patient safety, and ethical integrity. Each product that passes through our hands is a commitment to better outcomes — for patients, providers, and communities alike.

As the industry evolves, so do we. BioNix is actively reshaping what pharmaceutical accessibility looks like, with a future-focused lens on sustainability, innovation, and regional impact. Whether it's enabling hospitals with hard-to-source treatments or empowering health ministries with timely supply, BioNix stands at the intersection of urgency, trust, and transformation.

Join us on our journey as we set new benchmarks in healthcare accessibility.

Бизнес и есть путешествие, и наша задача сделать это путешествие максимально комфортным.

Name: GC Biotech
Description:
GC Biotech is a specialized research and development company focused on vaccine adjuvants. We provide global clients with integrated products, services, and technological solutions, covering the entire spectrum from raw materials and adjuvant molecules to delivery systems, spanning discovery through pre-clinical and clinical research.

Our core objectives are to build cost-effective adjuvant and formulation production capacity and become a trusted partner for researchers in both human and veterinary vaccine development. We excel at designing and developing tailored vaccine adjuvant systems to meet diverse needs, ultimately accelerating the global delivery of new vaccines.

We offer a robust portfolio of immune modulators and customized adjuvant molecules, including saponins (e.g., QS-21, QS-7) and TLR4 agonists (e.g., 3D-MPLA), all available in various scales, purity levels, and modifications, compliant with GLP/GMP standards.

Our delivery systems and formulations are designed for human and veterinary vaccine R&D, meeting GLP/GMP requirements. We provide three distinct delivery systems and support custom formulations, along with a variety of adjuvant formulations optimized for different vaccine antigens.

GC Biotech ensures that production and purification of adjuvant raw materials adhere to ISO9001 standards. Our adjuvant molecules are produced and purified under cGMP standards using high-performance liquid chromatography (HPLC), and our adjuvant systems leverage cutting-edge technologies for cGMP production. We provide comprehensive material and data packages to support customer research and product development.

Name: Com-Dental
Description:
Компания Ком-Денталь на протяжении 20 лет представляет на стоматологическом рынке услуги по трём основным направлениям:

профессиональная гигиена полости рта
хирургическая стоматология и имплантология
оснащение клиник стоматологическим и хирургическим инструментарием
Все направления деятельности группы компаний гармонично связаны и дополняют друг друга, что нашло отражение в логотипе «Ком-Денталь» (три пересекающихся кольца). Многие наши идеи и проекты в свое время явились абсолютно новыми и уникальными для Российского рынка. Немного истории:

Компания «Ком‐Денталь» была основана в 2001 году, в Москве. Это семейная компания.
В 2002 году компания «Ком-Денталь» эксклюзивно представляет в России ведущего мирового производителя стоматологических материалов Hu-Friedy (США).
В 2003 году на базе компании в Москве начинает работу единственный в России центр заточки и сервиса медицинских инструментов, авторизированный компанией Hu-Friedy.
В 2004 году подписывается эксклюзивный контракт с мировым производителем дентальных имплантатов компанией BIOMET 3i (США) и начала представлять интересы концерна не только в России.
В том же 2004 году подписывается знаменательный для компании контракт и компания становится эксклюзивным партнером компании CURAPROX (Швейцария).
2005 знаменует собой начало успешной работы с немецкими концернами BRUMABA, DR.MACH и ULTRADENT по комплектации операционных для стоматологических клиник.
В 2011 году начинается работа со швейцарским брендом SWISS SMILE и продаж средств гигиены в лучших косметических магазинах России.
В 2015 году компания выходит на рынки Белоруссии и Казахстана.
В 2020 году в компании работает более 60 сотрудников, мы работаем с 350 дилерами, 800 аптеками, 4000 стоматологическими клиниками и более чем с 10 000 стоматологов! На сегодняшний день Компания успешно работает на рынках России, Белоруссии и Казахстана. Компания сотрудничает с дистрибьюторами во многих регионах России.

Name: ZYJZECOM
Description:
We are delighted to find a like-minded company in the exosomes field! Our research team's focus highly aligns with yours, and we have currently achieved mass production of milk exosomes, with solid foundations in technical maturity and production stability.

Our core achievements include:

Milk exosomes stock solution: Particle concentration reaches 1.18E+12 particles/ml. Accelerated tests verify that it can be stably stored at 2-8°C for 2 years, meeting long-term storage and application needs;
Milk exosomes lyophilized powder: Particle concentration further increases to E+13 particles/ml. It appears as white powder with a purity of over 95%, allowing for longer storage and easier transportation.
In addition to high-quality mass-produced raw material supply, we can provide R&D contract manufacturing services to help reduce your initial R&D investment and production trial costs. Meanwhile, leveraging our technical accumulation and patent layout experience in this field, we offer exosome-related patent application assistance services, providing full support from identifying technical innovation points, drafting patent claims, to tracking processes and responding to examination opinions, helping you efficiently protect core technical achievements.

With the technological breakthroughs and large-scale production capabilities of Mainland technology companies, choosing us means not only stable raw material supply but also cost reduction and efficiency improvement through R&D contract manufacturing and patent application assistance.

We look forward to a strong collaboration with your company to jointly explore the application prospects in the milk exosomes field!
